name: Kaimana Shave Ice
tagline: All-natural fruit syrups with half the sugar and scratch-made ice cream — Haleiwa's gourmet contender to Matsumoto.
mustOrder: Any flavor with homemade mac nut ice cream — the signature combo
Liliko'i or mandarin — the tropical fruit syrups shine
Coffee flavor — unique and surprisingly good
parking: Street parking along Kamehameha Hwy in Haleiwa town
talkStory: Opened in 2018 in a barn-red building on Haleiwa's main road, Kaimana quickly became the locals' alternative to the Matsumoto tourist line. All syrups are made from real fruit with about half the sugar of conventional shave ice. The ice cream is made from scratch daily — vanilla, mac nut, banana, and a vegan option that's surprisingly rich. One size, one or two flavors, done right. Mon–Sat noon–4:30pm, closed Sundays. Small-batch means flavors rotate, so ask what's fresh.
